label: TIMELY SHIPMENT
contract_clause: Shipment must cross Bolivian border before 2026-04-05T00:00:00Z
court_question: Did the shipment cross the Bolivian border on or before 2026-04-05?

exporter_evidence.label: Exporter Evidence
exporter_evidence.description: Bill of lading signed by COSCO at Santa Cruz customs — 2026-04-03T14:22:00Z

importer_evidence.label: Importer Evidence
importer_evidence.description: Importer's internal logistics note citing 'expected late April' — pre-dispute misunderstanding, not proof of late shipment

settlement_consequence: Settlement proceeds as agreed. 73,950 PEN transferred to exporter.
